name: The City Golf
about: The City Golf is a premium indoor golf facility with locations in Los Angeles, Sherman Oaks, and West LA. It offers a world-class training environment using Foresight's GCQuad and Falcon launch monitors to provide precise ball-flight and club-head data. The venues are equipped with fully bays and feature a Performance Center with club fitting services, plus in-house instructors available for lessons or quick pointers.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade GCQuad and Falcon launch monitors provide immediate, precise feedback on every shot
Performance Center with a Golf Digest Top 100 Club Fitter for expert club fitting
Simulated 18-hole play offers the feel of a real round regardless of weather conditions

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed, quadrascopic camera system for precise ball and club data
Launch monitor for ball-flight and club-head performance data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs. The City Golf does not provide any rental clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a kitchen or bar, so it is best to assume outside food and drink are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for an 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention child-friendly policies, programs, or equipment.
